name: ÆNS — ENS Root Explorer + Write Records
description: ÆNS is a minimal ENS utility for inspecting root identity state and preparing the aens.* writes needed to publish capability metadata.
problemStatement: Most ENS demos for agents overreach into vague platform claims or hide useful actions behind speculative routes. The useful operator loop is smaller: inspect current ENS truth for a root identity, then prepare exact aens.* writes while keeping wallet approval explicit.

submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: Continue hardening ENS root explorer and write-records operator flow after hackathon
